Spine Chill Spear  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 28
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STA: +3 WIS: +6
SV COLD: +10
Effect: Shock of Ice (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 40
WT: 3.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR RNG ROG SHM BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 28
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 10

SV COLD: +10
Effect: Shock of Ice (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 40

Class: WAR RNG ROG SHM BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Spear of Chief Ry`Gorr
Item Type:1H Piercing
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:23 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:180
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-27 03:52:29
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 325pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 40

i say regardless of the level this thing procs, for any non-caster like my rogue or a warrior an extra 38 DMG every few hits is quite nice. 8)

QuoteReply
# Oct 27 2003 at 2:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362745901
11 posts
So.... This procs at what level?

RE: What level does it proc?
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2004 at 4:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362976012
29 posts
Why on Norrath would they hold the proc on this til level 40? It is a level 8 wizzy spell, I'm sure by 40 we could find something better than this--I'm currently using at 21 only because it was a gift and I can't afford a new weap, with the outrageously high cost of spells.

Edited, Tue Feb 17 16:47:01 2004

RE: What level does it proc?
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2004 at 10:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789080631
2 posts
Procs at 40
▲ Page top
Proc?
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2003 at 10:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966481229
67 posts
Any one know at what lvl this currently proc's at?
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 07 2003 at 12:20 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i was playing my lv 24 barabian shammy when it proced for me, i was helping the tank, and then proc....38dd, nothing compaired to my 137dd but hey it helps all the same. im now 26 and it still hasn't proced again......
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 10 2003 at 11:29 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Dang!
RE: Needs to be primary/secondary
QuoteReply
# May 03 2003 at 4:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758981874
36 posts
Damage bonuses are not applied to the damage rating, but the actual damage.

Your wurmslayer is still a 25/40, but it adds 4 damage on each swing. IT IS NOT A 29/40 WEAPON
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 26 2003 at 12:01 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Actually it IS 4 damage to the rating, why do you think high level warriors often carry lammies? Because it would be a 13/18 weapon. At lower levels, it can only be 1 dmg bonus, but my mythril knuckles (13/28) are 14/28 instead and do a whole heck of a lot more damage than one point, before I got the bonus.
RE: Needs to be primary/secondary
QuoteReply
# Nov 12 2003 at 4:17 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592251064527
110 posts
You are wrong, Biskwik. It is damage added onto each successful swing. If it were added onto the rating, my 45/44 2hb with a Damage Bonus of 40 would be an 85/44 and it would hit for more than 298 damage every swing.
▲ Page top
Procs at 40.
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2002 at 1:53 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591783612607
1 post
I've carried this bad boy for many seasons now.
Started procing for 38 pts DD (cold based) when I hit level 40.
Make sure you have your DEX buff on and this thing will go to town!!

Edited, Mon Nov 11 13:37:57 2002

oops sorry about that, but what i wanted to say was, if this proc is a level 8 wizzy spell y does it proc at level 40? i just bought one because i though it proced at a lower level.
Stupid spear
▲ Page top
RE: darn
QuoteReply
# Apr 06 2003 at 5:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783965906
235 posts
Stupid spear huh? Nice ratio if you ask me, and for the proc: Do you think it's fair for a lvl 8 (or above)character to cast a MANA FREE 40 dmg DD everytime they swung/stabbed/whatever with this thing, when a wizzy has to pay mana to use it? AND have it possibly interrupted? Stupid spear my ***** maybe 40 is a bit high, but 8 is certainly too low. So think again before you toss a good weapon because it doesnt proc yet......happy trails!

3 of us, 39 ranger, 40 wizy, and 41 druid (me) pounded the snot out of this guy last night. we're not twinks either cuz these are our first characters. we were running long the coast last night when out of no where he agroed the wizy. I have no clue what the hell he was doin way out there either. He dropped the Rygorr battlemail. would have been wicked if he droped the spear also, my beastlord could really use it.

▲ Page top
Finally!
QuoteReply
# Dec 27 2001 at 6:54 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247022121
Scholar
33 posts
I finally finagled a Charred Guardian Shield and a Spine Chill Spear to replace my Mortificator Staff. Since the MS is 2hb I know I'm better off with the 15 wis the two new items provide me rather than the 7 wis 45 mana the MS gave me. I'm having a hard time selling my MS and am considering holding on to it since there are other wis buffing items out there that can sufficiently buff my wis without having to give up the MS for good. If I can get a good price or good trade for my MS I'll go ahead and do it but I'm not in as much of a hurry to relinquish this rare item as I previously was. I suppose I'll just test the winds and see what comes from my patience. It's hard to give up an item that has been good to me for so very, very long. I'm still looking for an Ebon War Spear for my range slot unless something better comes along. But now that my wis is hovering at the 200 range I'm feeling more comfortable with holding on to the MS until a sweet deal comes along. Here's to hoping!

Prealia Predacious

51st Lady Barbarian Mystic
▲ Page top
RE: Finally!
QuoteReply
# Jan 09 2002 at 6:13 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966125773
11 posts
Good luck selling that morty staff, those things are junk by today's standards. Way back when they rocked because shaman had almost zero weapon choices but nowdays those things are a sad joke. Not sure why any shaman would use 2hb and give up all that AC and wis from a shield. I wouldn't personally pay 200p for a morty staff anymore and I can remember when they sold for 5k plus.
▲ Page top
RE: Finally!
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2003 at 12:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782682456
48 posts
This Shaman has a great 2hb weapon - Barbarian Spiritist Hammer. Plus 13 wis/int and procs for 251dd at level 36 (did 243dd at level 30 which is when it starts to proc). With all that being said I will still buy a Spine Chill at 40 just to keep my piercing skill up. And if nothing else you can always carry spears in your range slot to get the wis buff without actually having to fight with them.

Best Regards,

Jumgurorm Atrociter
36 Shaman
The Brell

ps - all of you aspiring young shammy's need to check out the Arctic Wyvern armor!!

# Jun 26 2002 at 11:25 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592254245024
3 posts
I have this weapon on an alt shammy that was given to me by a friend. I'm only lvl 19 right now as I don't play him alot but fully buffed and ready to go this weapon would proc like mad because everytime I'm fighting something you get the "your will in insufficent to wield this weapon". I must see that message 4 or 5 times per battle. Figure it may be a weak dd but procing 4 or 5 times that adds up. I can't wait till I get high enough for the weapon to proc.

Saryrn

QuoteReply

▲ Page top
my addition
QuoteReply
# Sep 22 2001 at 3:09 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251246757
Scholar
51 posts
First of all it procs at 40... I got mine as an unespected gift by helping to buff and heal a very nice lvl 49 war who was camping ice giants. I asked for nothing in return so he handed me a great weapon (go fig) anyway, I have a jade prod already and have found myself haveing a problem... The prod is 11/30 and the spear is 10/28. Seeing how I'm only in the low 20s, I've opted to use the prod till I get a little higher, which is what I suggest to anyone who has both and aren't lvl 40 yet. But since this thing does have a very nice dd for a proc, if you've only got a few lvls left till 40 and see this thing, buy it and bank it till you hit that lvl. 40 has been called the worst lvl in the game, maybe that kind of birthday present will help soften the blow.
▲ Page top
RE: my addition
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2001 at 5:48 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246830165
43 posts
ive never heard 40 called the worst level =p

45 and most of the 50+ levels are much worse
▲ Page top
RE: my addition
QuoteReply
# May 31 2002 at 12:59 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253751719
87 posts
BTW, I picked one of these up for my twinked shammy alt. One of the advantages of 50+, is the ability to start some alts that you can twink big time. Being a wiz with porting abilities, I can make big time pp, which I can use to buy very good equipment for my alt.

Some of you may turn your nose up at the low-level proc of this item. However, understand that if your skill is maxed, and you have haste added, you will proc this weapon alot during a fight. That 38dd proc'ed several times during a fight will add up, and be worth the same as a comparable dd shammy nuke at the proc level. It's also FREE damage without MANA.

Dont turn your nose up at proc items. Get one if you can. The major proc items are restricted to lvl 51 (club of the ice ocean for example).

▲ Page top
RE: my addition
QuoteReply
# May 31 2002 at 12:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253751719
87 posts
51+ just sucks, lol. You watch your xp just crawl. It's even worse when you start adding aa points.

Just so you all know this weapon procs at lvl 40, i just dinged 40 and it now procs, so good luck. oh and also.. prices dropped majorly, see them sell for around 600

Hmmmmm....
QuoteReply
# Sep 05 2001 at 1:52 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763878907
258 posts
I have one of these on my new rogue (had to start over because of complex reasons) and it is a great weapon BUT it doesn't proc on me in forever and a year. I was wondering if there is a good piercer out there that is just as good but doesn't have a proc or has a proc of 10 or so. There should be something with 10dmg and 25 dly or SOMETHING.... shouldn't there be? Anyway, my plan was to do a straight across trade and not get a better/worse weapon, just get the same value and not have to get to lvl 42 for the weapon's full use to come into effect. PLZ help me out here. Donka shan and peace!
▲ Page top

# Oct 24 2001 at 5:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250419454
56 posts
Another thing to consider.

Some of the famous 1k spear for shaman

slime coated Harpoon
Spine Chill spear
Jade Chokidai Prod


When a shaman buy spear DO NOT forget to check if it go into range slot.

EG. Jade prod and SPine chill both go into primary only
▲ Page top
lucky me again
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2001 at 5:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764472118
17 posts
G'day all,

I was in North Kaladim yesterday when I see one of these on auction, so I send a tell to the seller: Talane a high lvl hummie Druidess that had just kindly bind me there.

I ask her for some info about that SPS, and then gasp at the stats of that wonderful spear (nice for a WIS caster), then I try to swap it for a blackened alloy longsword, blackened alloy gloves and lizardscale mantle (AC5 INT3 WIS3). she just inspects me, and finally gives me the spear for free, telling me that I've not tried to con her and did an honest trade, telling me then to remember once I'm a high lvl to do so with low lvl players ! Be sure I will...

Man how glad I was to get such a nice Piercer since I really need to raise my skill.

Many thanks again Talane, you rule !


Solonor,
woodie ranger,
karana server
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 06 2001 at 8:32 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) My signature says it all :P
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 12 2001 at 10:21 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Heeeeyy.... that's my quote! From the croaking dirk thread!

QuoteReply
# Aug 29 2001 at 10:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1674433027166
38 posts
This weapon procs around level 35. Nice item, be warned, the chief quads me at 51 for 160....and he has alot of hp <4 ice comets! =)>

▲ Page top
RE: Proc Level
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2002 at 12:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751475136
14 posts
Be also warned that killing da chief may spawn the avengers which won't take kindly to you and will rough you up. They will however be kind enough to gate you to your bind spot (less your gear of course)
▲ Page top
Lucky partner
QuoteReply
# Aug 29 2001 at 2:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248726897
28 posts
Last night I grouped with a LVL 23 TWINKED monk in LOIO, having a overall good time beating the crap outa stuff with my Velium spear. We played for a hour or 2 and b4 he logged he told me he would give me a good spear if he ever finds one. I wasn't really expecting anything when today he messages me tellin me he got something for me, he popped it in the trade window i gasped. So i got a free SCS today and man WOW what a freakin difference. I seriously outdamaged both the warrior and ranger i grouped with today ( i'm a shammy BTW) Someday i will do the same as he did to me. Wahoo!
Chastize 23 shammy
Vandel 18 warrior
